title: Context Switching (Member / Shop Identity)
description: Identity system overview: member/shop context switching via Zustand store, X-Nessi-Context header on every request, localStorage persistence, page load rehydration, and edge case handling.

flows.title: Identity System Overview
flows.trigger: User logs in — default context is member

steps.title: Set Default Context
steps.tooltip: User logs in — default: { type: 'member' }

steps.title: Check Shop Membership
steps.tooltip: Check if user belongs to shops

steps.title: Show Context Switcher
steps.tooltip: Navbar shows context switcher dropdown (if shops exist)

steps.title: Switch to Member
steps.tooltip: switchToMember() — Zustand: { type: 'member' }, X-Nessi-Context: member

steps.title: Switch to Shop
steps.tooltip: switchToShop(shopId, shopName) — Zustand: { type: 'shop', shopId }, X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId}

steps.title: Persist Context
steps.tooltip: Persisted to localStorage — survives refresh, tab close, re-open

flows.title: How Context Affects Operations
flows.trigger: User performs any operation in a given context

steps.title: Create as Member
steps.tooltip: member_id = user.id, shop_id = null — appears on /member/[slug]

steps.title: Create as Shop
steps.tooltip: shop_id = shopId, member_id = null — appears on /shop/[slug]

steps.title: Member Dashboard
steps.tooltip: Personal dashboard KPIs

steps.title: Shop Dashboard
steps.tooltip: Shop dashboard KPIs

steps.title: No Shop Settings
steps.tooltip: Shop settings not available in member context

steps.title: Shop Settings Access
steps.tooltip: Accessible based on role

steps.title: Upload as Member
steps.tooltip: Assets stored in members/{userId}/

steps.title: Upload as Shop
steps.tooltip: Assets stored in shops/{shopId}/

steps.title: Rehydrate Store
steps.tooltip: Zustand rehydrates from localStorage

steps.title: Set Default Context
steps.tooltip: No stored context — default to { type: 'member' }

steps.title: Restore Member
steps.tooltip: Stored member context — set context: member

steps.title: Restore Shop
steps.tooltip: Stored shop context — set context: shop:{id}

steps.title: Validate Membership
steps.tooltip: First API call validates shop membership

steps.title: Shop Deleted
steps.tooltip: Shop deleted while user in shop context — next API call → 403 → revocation

steps.title: Role Changed
steps.tooltip: Role changed (e.g., owner to contributor). API checks role per request, UI may show stale until refresh.

steps.title: Multi-Tab Sync
steps.tooltip: Multiple tabs in different contexts — localStorage sync via StorageEvent, both tabs update

steps.title: Storage Cleared
steps.tooltip: localStorage cleared or incognito — defaults to member context
